translation_text: He whose boldness appears in his daring (to do wrong, in defiance of the laws) is put to death;
translation_text_raw: He whose boldness appears in his daring (to do wrong, in defiance of the laws) is put to death;

translation_text: he whose boldness appears in his not daring (to do so) lives on.

translation_text: Of these two cases the one appears to be advantageous, and the other to be injurious.

translation_text: But When Heaven's anger smites a man,

translation_text: Who the cause shall truly scan?
translation_text_raw: Who the cause shall truly scan?

translation_text: On this account the sage feels a difficulty (as to what to do in the former case).

translation_text: It is the way of Heaven not to strive, and yet it skilfully overcomes;
translation_text_raw: It is the way of Heaven not to strive, and yet it skilfully overcomes;

translation_text: not to speak, and yet it is skilful in (obtaining a reply);
translation_text_raw: not to speak, and yet it is skilful in (obtaining a reply);

translation_text: does not call, and yet men come to it of themselves.
translation_text_raw: does not call, and yet men come to it of themselves.

translation_text: Its demonstrations are quiet, and yet its plans are skilful and effective.
translation_text_raw: Its demonstrations are quiet, and yet its plans are skilful and effective.

translation_text: The meshes of the net of Heaven are large;
translation_text_raw: The meshes of the net of Heaven are large;

translation_text: far apart, but letting nothing escape.
